sections.label: Verse 1
lines: It aw, nuam tak ihmu-in tawlnga in
I Topa dip tung lukhamin nei in
Nang kong it hang, Topa'n hong itzaw sem
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Naungek bang nuamtak ihmu hithiat in
Dahna, kahnate'n nang hong phawng lo ding
Nang a a nuam hithiat ihmutna hi
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hih leitungah niliim a bei mateng
Topa'n A tubuuk sung hong khop mateng
Ni vaang taang khuamial a hong bei mateng
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Pasian tokhom mai kimuh kik mateng
A sia thei lo puan a hoih piak mateng
Tu'n i theih bangin i kitheih mateng
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Minthanna thawh kik zing khuavak mateng
Khazih sung a site thawh kik mateng
Gina lo bek tawh hong pai kik lo ding
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!
